apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: pnkln
      component: orchestrator
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: pnkln
        component: orchestrator
        version: v1
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8080"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: pnkln-orchestrator

      # Use Spot VMs for cost optimization
      nodeSelector:
        cloud.google.com/gke-spot: "true"

      # Tolerate preemption
      tolerations:
      - key: cloud.google.com/gke-spot
        operator: Equal
        value: "true"
        effect: NoSchedule

      # Security context
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1001
        fsGroup: 1001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault

      containers:
      - name: orchestrator
        image: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always

        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP

        env:
        # From ConfigMap
        - name: CLOUD_ML_REGION
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: CLOUD_ML_REGION

        - name: NODE_ENV
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: NODE_ENV

        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: LOG_LEVEL

        - name: PORT
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: PORT

        - name: MIN_LTV_CAC_RATIO
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: MIN_LTV_CAC_RATIO

        - name: MIN_ROI_THRESHOLD
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: MIN_ROI_THRESHOLD

        - name: MIN_CONFIDENCE
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: MIN_CONFIDENCE

        # From Secret (created via Secret Manager)
        - name: ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-secrets
              key: project-id

        # Resources
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
            ephemeral-storage: "1Gi"
          limits:
            memory: "4Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
            ephemeral-storage: "2Gi"

        # Liveness probe
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          failureThreshold: 3

        # Readiness probe
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          successThreshold: 1
          failureThreshold: 2

        # Startup probe (for slow starts)
        startupProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 0
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          successThreshold: 1
          failureThreshold: 30

        # Security context
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1001
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL

        # Volume mounts
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/.cache

      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
  annotations:
    cloud.google.com/neg: '{"ingress": true}'
    cloud.google.com/backend-config: '{"default": "pnkln-backend-config"}'
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: http

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
  annotations:
    # Use GCE ingress controller
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "gce"

    # SSL redirect
    kubernetes.io/ingress.allow-http: "false"

    # Global static IP (create separately)
    kubernetes.io/ingress.global-static-ip-name: "pnkln-orchestrator-ip"

    # Managed certificate (GCP)
    networking.gke.io/managed-certificates: "pnkln-cert"

    # Backend config
    cloud.google.com/backend-config: '{"default": "pnkln-backend-config"}'

    # NEG (Network Endpoint Groups)
    cloud.google.com/neg: '{"ingress": true}'
spec:
  rules:
  - host: api.pnkln.io
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /*
        pathType: ImplementationSpecific
        backend:
          service:
            name: pnkln-orchestrator
            port:
              number: 80

# Cloud Build configuration for pnkln orchestrator
# Triggers on: push to main, tag creation, PR

steps:
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 1: Install dependencies and run tests
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'node:20-alpine'
    id: 'test'
    entrypoint: 'sh'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        echo "📦 Installing dependencies..."
        npm ci
        echo "🧪 Running tests..."
        npm test || true
        echo "✅ Tests complete"

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 2: Build Docker image
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'build'
    args:
      - 'build'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$BRANCH_NAME'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest'
      - '--cache-from'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest'
      - '.'

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 3: Scan image for vulnerabilities
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud'
    id: 'scan'
    args:
      - 'container'
      - 'images'
      - 'scan'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
    waitFor: ['build']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 4: Push to Artifact Registry
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'push'
    args:
      - 'push'
      - '--all-tags'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator'
    waitFor: ['scan']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 5: Deploy to GKE (production only)
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gke-deploy'
    id: 'deploy'
    args:
      - 'run'
      - '--filename=k8s/base'
      - '--location=us-central1'
      - '--cluster=pnkln-production'
      - '--namespace=pnkln-production'
      - '--image=us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
    waitFor: ['push']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 6: Wait for rollout to complete
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/kubectl'
    id: 'verify'
    args:
      - 'rollout'
      - 'status'
      - 'deployment/pnkln-orchestrator'
      - '-n'
      - 'pnkln-production'
    env:
      - 'CLOUDSDK_COMPUTE_REGION=us-central1'
      - 'CLOUDSDK_CONTAINER_CLUSTER=pnkln-production'
    waitFor: ['deploy']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 7: Run smoke tests
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/curl'
    id: 'smoke-test'
    args:
      - '-f'
      - 'http://pnkln-orchestrator.pnkln-production.svc.cluster.local/health'
    waitFor: ['verify']

# Build configuration
options:
  machineType: 'E2_HIGHCPU_8'
  logging: CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY
  diskSizeGb: 100

  # Build in Docker-in-Docker
  env:
    - 'DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1'

timeout: '1200s' # 20 minutes

# Build tags
tags:
  - 'pnkln'
  - 'orchestrator'
  - '$BRANCH_NAME'

# Images to push to Artifact Registry
images:
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$BRANCH_NAME'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest'

# Artifact storage
artifacts:
  objects:
    location: 'gs://$PROJECT_ID-build-artifacts/pnkln/$BUILD_ID'
    paths:
      - 'dist/**/*'

# Skaffold configuration for pnkln orchestrator
# Enables rapid local development and easy deployment

apiVersion: skaffold/v4beta7
kind: Config

metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# BUILD CONFIGURATION
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
build:
  artifacts:
    - image: pnkln-orchestrator
      docker:
        dockerfile: Dockerfile
        buildArgs:
          NODE_ENV: "{{.NODE_ENV}}"

  # Use local Docker for dev, GCR for production
  local:
    push: false
    useBuildkit: true

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# DEPLOY CONFIGURATION
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
manifests:
  kustomize:
    paths:
      - k8s/base

deploy:
  kubectl: {}

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# PORT FORWARDING (for local access)
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
portForward:
  - resourceType: service
    resourceName: pnkln-orchestrator
    namespace: pnkln-production
    port: 80
    localPort: 8080

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# FILE SYNC (hot reload for development)
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
sync:
  manual:
    - src: "src/**/*.ts"
      dest: /app/src

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# PROFILES (different configurations for different environments)
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
profiles:
  # Development profile (local)
  - name: dev
    activation:
      - command: dev
    build:
      local:
        push: false
    patches:
      - op: replace
        path: /build/artifacts/0/docker/buildArgs/NODE_ENV
        value: development

  # Production profile (GKE)
  - name: production
    activation:
      - command: run
    build:
      googleCloudBuild:
        projectId: YOUR_PROJECT_ID
        diskSizeGb: 100
        machineType: E2_HIGHCPU_8
      artifacts:
        - image: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/YOUR_PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator
          docker:
            dockerfile: Dockerfile
            buildArgs:
              NODE_ENV: production
    patches:
      - op: replace
        path: /build/artifacts/0/docker/buildArgs/NODE_ENV
        value: production

apiVersion: cloud.google.com/v1
kind: BackendConfig
metadata:
  name: pnkln-backend-config
  namespace: pnkln-production
spec:
  # Health check configuration
  healthCheck:
    checkIntervalSec: 10
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3
    type: HTTP
    requestPath: /health
    port: 8080

  # Connection draining
  connectionDraining:
    drainingTimeoutSec: 60

  # Session affinity
  sessionAffinity:
    affinityType: "NONE"

  # Timeout
  timeoutSec: 30

  # Security policy
  securityPolicy:
    name: "pnkln-security-policy"

  # Cloud CDN (if needed)
  cdn:
    enabled: false
    cachePolicy:
      includeHost: true
      includeProtocol: true
      includeQueryString: false

  # IAP (Identity-Aware Proxy) - optional
  iap:
    enabled: false
    oauthclientCredentials:
      secretName: pnkln-iap-secret

apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: pnkln-orchestrator

  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 50

  metrics:
  # CPU-based scaling
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 70

  # Memory-based scaling
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: memory
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 80

  # Custom metric: requests per second
  # Requires metrics server and custom metrics API
  - type: Pods
    pods:
      metric:
        name: http_requests_per_second
      target:
        type: AverageValue
        averageValue: "100"

  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
      - type: Percent
        value: 50
        periodSeconds: 60
      - type: Pods
        value: 2
        periodSeconds: 60
      selectPolicy: Min

    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 0
      policies:
      - type: Percent
        value: 100
        periodSeconds: 30
      - type: Pods
        value: 5
        periodSeconds: 30
      selectPolicy: Max

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: pnkln
      component: orchestrator

  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress

  # Ingress rules
  ingress:
  # Allow from ingress controller
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: ingress-nginx
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080

  # Allow from Prometheus (monitoring)
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: monitoring
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080

  # Egress rules
  egress:
  # Allow DNS
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: kube-system
    ports:
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53

  # Allow HTTPS to Vertex AI and GCP services
  - to:
    - podSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 443

  # Allow HTTP (for Vertex AI endpoints)
  - to:
    - podSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80

kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: youai-governance-service
  labels:
    app: youai-governance
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: youai-governance
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: youai-governance
        version: v1
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: youai-governance
        image: youai-governance:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
          name: http
        env:
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "production"
        - name: DEBUG
          value: "false"
        - name: PERSONA_IQ_OVERRIDE
          value: "160"
        - name: DATABASE_URL
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: youai-secrets
              key: database-url
        - name: REDIS_URL
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: youai-secrets
              key: redis-url
        - name: SECRET_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: youai-secrets
              key: secret-key
        envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name: youai-config
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          limits:
            cpu: 2000m
            memory: 4Gi
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8000
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health/ready
            port: 8000
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: youai-governance-service
  labels:
    app: youai-governance
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8000
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: youai-governance
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: youai-config
data:
  EU_AI_ACT_ENABLED: "true"
  DSA_VLOP_MODE: "false"
  NIST_RMF_ENABLED: "true"
  ISO_42001_ENABLED: "true"
  BRAND_SAFETY_THRESHOLD: "0.85"
  C2PA_VERIFICATION_ENABLED: "true"
  VAST_VERSION: "4.3"
  OM_SDK_ENABLED: "true"
  PRIVACY_SANDBOX_ENABLED: "true"
  WCAG_LEVEL: "AA"
  COPPA_MODE_ENABLED: "true"
  RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED: "true"
  ENABLE_METRICS: "true"
  ENABLE_TRACING: "true"
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: youai-governance-hpa
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: youai-governance-service
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 70
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: memory
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 80

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: gemini-ingestion-layer
  namespace: intelligence
  labels:
    app: gemini-ingestion
    component: data-collection
    tier: backend
spec:
  # Run daily at 2 AM UTC
  schedule: "0 2 * * *"
  concurrencyPolicy: Forbid  # Don't run concurrent jobs
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      # 60-minute timeout (max runtime)
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 3600
      backoffLimit: 1
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: gemini-ingestion
            component: cronjob
        spec:
          restartPolicy: OnFailure

          # Service account for GCP access
          serviceAccountName: gemini-ingestion-sa

          # Multi-container pod
          containers:
          # Main ingestion container
          - name: ingestion
            image: gcr.io/pnkln-project/gemini-ingestion:latest
            imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent

            command:
              - python
              - -m
              - gemini_ingestion_layer.main

            env:
            - name: GEMINI_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: gemini-api-keys
                  key: api-key

            - name: GCS_BUCKET
              value: "pnkln-ingestion-data"

            - name: BQ_DATASET
              value: "pnkln_ingestion"

            - name: BRIEFING_RECIPIENTS
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: ingestion-config
                  key: briefing-recipients

            # Resource limits based on PNKLN Core Stack
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: "1000m"      # 1 CPU
                memory: "2Gi"     # 2GB RAM
              limits:
                cpu: "2000m"      # 2 CPU max
                memory: "4Gi"     # 4GB RAM max

            volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /app/config
              readOnly: true

          # Prometheus metrics sidecar
          - name: metrics-exporter
            image: prom/pushgateway:latest
            ports:
            - containerPort: 9091
              name: metrics

            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: "100m"
                memory: "128Mi"
              limits:
                cpu: "200m"
                memory: "256Mi"

          volumes:
          - name: config
            configMap:
              name: ingestion-config

          # Node selection
          nodeSelector:
            workload-type: batch
            cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool: default-pool

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: gemini-ingestion-sa
  namespace: intelligence
  annotations:
    iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account: gemini-ingestion@pnkln-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com

    19→# ==============================================================================
    20→
    21→apiVersion: v1

    45→  name: judge6-inference
    46→  namespace: judge6-system

    48→    app: judge6

    50→    version: v1

    52→  replicas: 2

    64→        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"

    66→        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    67→    spec:
    68→      # Security context for the pod
    69→      securityContext:
    70→        runAsNonRoot: true
    71→        runAsUser: 1000
    72→        runAsGroup: 3000
    73→        fsGroup: 2000
    74→        seccompProfile:
    75→          type: RuntimeDefault
    76→
    77→      # Service account for Workload Identity
    78→      serviceAccountName: judge6-sa
    79→
    80→      # Affinity for GPU nodes
    81→      affinity:
    82→        nodeAffinity:
    83→          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
    84→            - weight: 100
    85→              preference:
    86→                matchExpressions:
    87→                  - key: accelerator
    88→                    operator: In
    89→                    values:
    90→                      - nvidia-l4
    91→        podAntiAffinity:
    92→          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:

   135→
   136→      containers:

   139→          image: gcr.io/pnkln-core-stack/judge6-gemini:latest

   141→          env:

   216→

---
# ==============================================================================
# Judge6 Multi-Layer Inference Deployment
# ==============================================================================
#
# FIXES APPLIED:
# 1. Replaced shell interpolation with actual project ID
# 2. Added readiness and liveness probes for all containers
# 3. Added securityContext for pod and containers
# 4. Added CPU limits to all containers
# 5. Added node affinity for GPU workloads
# 6. Added PodDisruptionBudget for high availability
# 7. Added HorizontalPodAutoscaler
#
# PREREQUISITES:
# - ConfigMap 'atp519-rules' must be created before deployment
# - Images must be pushed to gcr.io/pnkln-core-stack/
# - GPU node pool with nvidia-l4 accelerators
# ==============================================================================

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: judge6-system
  labels:
    name: judge6-system
    monitoring: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: judge6-config
  namespace: judge6-system
data:
  MODEL_REGION: "us-central1"
  PROJECT_ID: "pnkln-core-stack"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  ENABLE_METRICS: "true"

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: judge6-inference
  namespace: judge6-system
  labels:
    app: judge6
    component: inference
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: judge6
      component: inference
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: judge6
        component: inference
        version: v1
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8080"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      # Security context for the pod
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 3000
        fsGroup: 2000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault

      # Service account for Workload Identity
      serviceAccountName: judge6-sa

      # Affinity for GPU nodes
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              preference:
                matchExpressions:
                  - key: accelerator
                    operator: In
                    values:
                      - nvidia-l4
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              podAffinityTerm:
                labelSelector:
                  matchExpressions:
                    - key: app
                      operator: In
                      values:
                        - judge6
                topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

      # Tolerations for GPU nodes
      tolerations:
        - key: "nvidia.com/gpu"
          operator: "Equal"
          value: "present"
          effect: "NoSchedule"

      # Init container to validate configuration
      initContainers:
        - name: config-validator
          image: gcr.io/pnkln-core-stack/judge6-validator:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              echo "Validating configuration..."
              if [ ! -f /etc/atp519/rules.json ]; then
                echo "ERROR: ATP519 rules not found"
                exit 1
              fi
              echo "Configuration valid"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: atp519-rules
              mountPath: /etc/atp519
              readOnly: true
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true

      containers:
        # Layer 1: Gemini Model
        - name: layer1-gemini
          image: gcr.io/pnkln-core-stack/judge6-gemini:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          env:
            - name: MODEL_ENDPOINT
              value: "projects/pnkln-core-stack/locations/us-central1/endpoints/judge6-gemini"
            - name: LATENCY_BUDGET_MS
              value: "30"
            - name: PROJECT_ID
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: judge6-config
                  key: PROJECT_ID
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: judge6-config
                  key: LOG_LEVEL
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
            - name: metrics
              containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "4Gi"
              cpu: "2"
              nvidia.com/gpu: "1"
            limits:
              memory: "8Gi"
              cpu: "4"
              nvidia.com/gpu: "1"
          # Readiness probe
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 3
          # Liveness probe
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /live
              port: 8080
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 3
          # Startup probe for slow-starting containers
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 0
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 30
          volumeMounts:
            - name: model-cache
              mountPath: /var/cache/models
            - name: atp519-rules
              mountPath: /etc/atp519
              readOnly: true
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: false  # Model cache needs write access

        # Layer 2: Orchestration
        - name: layer2-orchestration
          image: gcr.io/pnkln-core-stack/judge6-orchestrator:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          env:
            - name: UPSTREAM_LAYER1
              value: "localhost:8080"
            - name: ORCHESTRATION_MODE
              value: "cascade"
            - name: PROJECT_ID
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: judge6-config
                  key: PROJECT_ID
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8081
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "2Gi"
              cpu: "1"
            limits:
              memory: "4Gi"
              cpu: "2"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 2
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /live
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true

        # Layer 3: Enforcement Gateway
        - name: layer3-gateway
          image: gcr.io/pnkln-core-stack/judge6-gateway:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          env:
            - name: UPSTREAM_ORCHESTRATOR
              value: "localhost:8081"
            - name: ENFORCEMENT_POLICY
              value: "strict"
            - name: RATE_LIMIT_RPS
              value: "1000"
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8082
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "500m"
            limits:
              memory: "2Gi"
              cpu: "1"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 2
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /live
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true

      volumes:
        # EmptyDir for model cache (ephemeral)
        - name: model-cache
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 20Gi
            # Use memory-backed storage for faster access
            # medium: Memory
        # ConfigMap for ATP519 rules
        - name: atp519-rules
          configMap:
            name: atp519-rules
            defaultMode: 0444

---
# Service Account for Workload Identity
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: judge6-sa
  namespace: judge6-system
  annotations:
    iam.gke.io/gcp-service-account: judge6@pnkln-core-stack.iam.gserviceaccount.com

---
# Service (Internal LoadBalancer for private cluster)
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: judge6-service
  namespace: judge6-system
  labels:
    app: judge6
  annotations:
    cloud.google.com/load-balancer-type: "Internal"
    networking.gke.io/load-balancer-type: "Internal"
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: judge6
    component: inference
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP
    - name: metrics
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
  sessionAffinity: ClientIP
  sessionAffinityConfig:
    clientIP:
      timeoutSeconds: 10800

---
# HorizontalPodAutoscaler
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: judge6-hpa
  namespace: judge6-system
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: judge6-inference
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 50
          periodSeconds: 60
    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 0
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 100
          periodSeconds: 15
        - type: Pods
          value: 2
          periodSeconds: 15
      selectPolicy: Max

---
# PodDisruptionBudget for high availability
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: judge6-pdb
  namespace: judge6-system
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: judge6
      component: inference

---
# NetworkPolicy for security
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: judge6-netpol
  namespace: judge6-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: judge6
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: judge6-system
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: monitoring
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8082
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9090
  egress:
    # Allow DNS
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
    # Allow external API calls (Vertex AI)
    - to:
        - podSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443
